posts.author: carlaohare (Carla)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi folks,

Happy New Year!
We started to use Monday.com for Project Management in 2024. So far so good!

We’ve used the PMO template (project requests and approvals, portfolio management board and project boards). I’d like to get some insights into what others are doing at year end / start of new year regarding housekeeping on the workspace, particularly with projects / requests that were closed out in the previous year.
